title: Trump squashed GOP dissenters in Indiana. Who's next?
shortDescription: Trump endorsed challengers to beat fellow Republicans he contends were disloyal in Kentucky, Louisiana and Georgia.

title: Trump administration can keep ballots seized in Georgia, judge rules
shortDescription: Atlanta-based U.S. District Judge J.P. Boulee rejected Fulton County’s request for return of original copies of materials seized during FBI search.

title: Americans support the Pope, unhappy over Trump's Jesus posts: Poll
shortDescription: Americans show positive reactions toward Pope Leo XIV's comments against war in Iran, respond negatively to Trump’s social media posts, poll reveals.

title: Rubio to meet Pope Leo amid Trump tensions
shortDescription: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will meet with Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican on May 7 as President Trump continues to feud with the Catholic leader.

title: FBI raids Virginia Senate leader’s office, cannabis business: reports
shortDescription: The FBI searched Virginia state Senate leader L. Louise Lucas' office and a cannabis retail business she co-owns May 6 in a corruption investigation.

title: Trump unveils UFC cage designs for South Lawn
shortDescription: "It's never going to happen again." President Donald Trump unveiled a rendering of the temporary UFC cage that will be built on the White House lawn.

title: Trump unveils images of UFC event at transformed White House
shortDescription: President Trump unveiled renderings of a transformed South Lawn of the White House that will host a UFC event in June.

title: Papal peacemaker? Rubio visits Pope Leo after Trump's attacks
shortDescription: A potential political problem of President Trump’s own making hangs over Marco Rubio's visit with Pope Leo: Catholics are America's largest religious group.

title: Obama decries Trump weaponizing the DOJ
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama called out President Donald Trump for directing the Justice Department to prosecute his political opponents and critics.

title: Melania Trump honors the 'quiet power' of military moms
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump honored the "quiet power" and "resolve" of military mothers ahead of Mother's Day.

title: Trump predicts Iran will 'end up agreeing' on US demands
shortDescription: Trump says Iran will ultimately accept U.S. demands on nuclear issues and Strait of Hormuz shipping.

title: Trump rejects US role as 'global police officer' to fight terrorism
shortDescription: Trump updated the country's counterterrorism policy to target ideological groups overseas and violent extremists at home.

title: 'Not the president's consigliere': Obama slams Trump over DOJ directives
shortDescription: Ex-President Barack Obama slammed President Donald Trump for ordering prosecutions, saying the attorney general isn't the president's "consigliere."

title: Is America happy with Trump? How the president rates in latest poll
shortDescription: A new Marist poll shows more Americans are unhappy with President Trump's handling of the Iran war and rising gas prices.

title: Republicans seek $1 billion to boost security for White House ballroom
shortDescription: Republicans are seeking $1 billion in taxpayer money for security related to President Trump's ballroom, setting up a showdown with Democrats.

title: Why the Indiana election results are significant for Trump
shortDescription: Trump's allies ousted five Indiana GOP senators who blocked redistricting, signaling his continued sway over the party.

title: Trump reignites feud with Pope ahead of Rubio's Vatican visit
shortDescription: The president and Pope Leo are trading pointed remarks again over the Iran war, days before Secretary of State Marco Rubio's Vatican visit this week.

title: Trump renews clash with Pope over Iran remarks
shortDescription: Trump criticizes Pope Leo over Iran nuclear weapons as Vatican prepares for Marco Rubio visit amid rising US Vatican tensions.

title: See logo for Palm Beach's newly renamed Trump International Airport
shortDescription: The new, all-gold logo, recommended by the Trump Organization, has as an eagle holding two olive branches.

title: See Trump news, updates and schedule from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Indiana voters mostly sided with Trump-backed candidates in primaries. Trump reinstated the Presidential Fitness Test Award. “Project Freedom” ended days after it started.

title: Michigan election results: Firefighter's win seals blue state Senate
shortDescription: Democrats retain control of battleground state's Senate.
